subject: Clarify perspectives: 2 parties + shareholder view for mutual ownership
body:
Major documentation update to clarify the perspective framework:

- Independent parties: 2 perspectives (Developer, Buyer)
- Mutual ownership: 3 perspectives (adds Shareholder view)

Key changes:
- Renamed "Combined Perspective" to "Shareholder Perspective"
- Clarified this is NOT about group accounting consolidation
- Shareholder view shows what's best for the person who owns both entities
- Focus on: where should profit sit? what's my total tax position?

Updated files:
- BUSINESS_GUIDE.md: Rewrote Perspective Analysis section
- claude.md: Updated framework description and entity config
- All 6 model concept docs: Updated Combined->Shareholder sections
title: Clarify perspectives: 2 parties + shareholder view for mutual ownership
